SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Martina McGrath, appears with her attorney Sarah Davis. Respondent, Richard Maxwell, appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge O'Grady.
